headline: Recovery still in early stage. Peg restoration and program participation lagging.

subscores.label: Peg restoration
subscores.method: scaled from $0.66 (depeg low) → $0.98 (staking-ratchet halt, per SIP-420)

subscores.label: Net flow trend
subscores.value_text: Green: post-unlock outflow at 0.01% exit ratio
subscores.method: Sell-Pressure Radar alert level → green=90 / amber=50 / red=20
